use_cases: Triggering primary actions in forms and applications
Navigation and routing through clickable buttons
Submitting form data with styled CTA buttons
Creating accessible icon-only buttons for toolbars
Implementing action buttons in cards and dialogs
ai_summary: A reusable button component from shadcn/ui featuring multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, small, large, icon). Built with class-variance-authority for variant management and Radix UI Slot for composition patterns. Provides accessible, ring-focused styling out of the box and supports disabled states. Universal atomic component suitable for any SaaS, e-commerce, or web application requiring clickable action triggers.
